mapper.select: SELECT id, inverter_id AS inverterId, status, -- 여긴 숫자(Integer)가 들어가야 함! alert_type AS alertType, severity, message, -- 여기에 'DB연결 테스트'가 들어감! created_at AS createdAt, resolved_at AS resolvedAt FROM alert_log
SELECT id, inverter_id, status, alert_type, severity, message, created_at, checked_at, resolved_at, duration_seconds FROM alert_log WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE alert_log SET status = #{status}, checked_at = #{checkedAt}, resolved_at = #{resolvedAt}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds} WHERE id = #{id}
